title: ligusticum lucidum subsp. lucidum
intro: Ligusticum lucidum subsp. lucidum, also known as Chinese Angelica or Dong Quai, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health conditions such as menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ligusticum lucidum subsp. lucidum include its ability to improve blood circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Ligusticum lucidum subsp. lucidum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support women's health and overall well-being.
